dct_description_sm: New York City Building Points, 2014 is a point theme representing building locations in New York City as of 2014. Columbia Libraries staff downloaded this dataset from NYC Open Data at https://data.cityofnewyork.us/Housing-Development/Building-Footprints/nqwf-w8eh reprojected it to state plane coordinates and reformatted to the geopackage format in September of 2023. Additional information about the data may be found at https://github.com/CityOfNewYork/nyc-geo-metadata/blob/master/Metadata/Metadata_BuildingFootprints.md
dct_creator_sm: New York (N.Y.). Department of Information Technology and Telecommunications.
dct_publisher_sm: New York (N.Y.). Department of Information Technology and Telecommunications.
dct_rightsHolder_sm: New York (N.Y.). Department of Information Technology and Telecommunications.
